since_last: 53% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.22%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.92% · Gold +0.01% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 53% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.22%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.22%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +6.08%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +6.08%, BABA +4.71%, TER +3.54%, MDB +3.53%, SMR +3.50%. Laggards: DELL -3.65%, ORCL -3.56%, TLN -3.24%, KLAC -3.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.94% at $120.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
